description: The LegacyRadio component was used in old UI mainly in export and import dialogues. This component should not be used in new content and replaced whenever possible.

fields.Radius: The radius of this option sphere.
fields._colliderRadius: The field to drive for the radius of the collider so it matches the visual.
fields._icosphere: The ico sphere mesh used to make the option click able visual.
fields._material: The material used for this component's visual.
fields._group: The manager for this component as a part of a group of radio options.
fields._orderNumber: Which option in the list this is.
